contract.name: v2/agency/toptier_code/sub_components/bureau_slug.md
contract.description: Return federal accounts and appropriation totals for a specific agency sub-component in a fiscal year.

toptier_code.description: Top-tier agency code; numeric string with leading zeroes allowed.
toptier_code.constraints: Required; appears limited to CGAC/FREC codes (3-4 digits). Unknown codes return 404 HTML.

bureau_slug.description: Slug identifier for the agency sub-component (hyphen-separated in production).
bureau_slug.constraints: Required; invalid slugs return 200 with zero totals instead of 404.

fiscal_year.constraints: Optional; must be an integer no greater than current FY (422 when >2026). Requests <=2014 returned 500 HTML, so the lower bound is unclear.

agency_type.description: Select awarding or funding agency data.
agency_type.constraints: Optional; accepts 'awarding' (default) or 'funding'. Empty string falls back to default. Case sensitive.

order.description: Sort direction for the chosen field.
order.constraints: Optional; 'desc' default. Only 'asc' or 'desc' accepted; case sensitive.

page.constraints: Optional; must be integer >=1. Values above available data return empty arrays; 0 or negatives yield 422.

limit.description: Number of accounts to return per page.
limit.constraints: Optional; default 10. Must be integer between 1 and 100 inclusive; rejects values outside range with 422 and non-integers with 400.

toptier_code.description: Echoed top-tier code from the request.

bureau_slug.description: Echoed sub-component slug (may echo invalid slug when no data).

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year used to generate the totals.

totals.description: Aggregated totals for the bureau in the fiscal year with monetary fields (0 when no data).

page_metadata.description: Pagination metadata: page, total result count, limit, next/previous page numbers, and booleans hasNext/hasPrevious.

results.description: List of federal account records with fields name, id, total_obligations, total_outlays, total_budgetary_resources.

messages.description: Array of warning strings (empty in all observed cases).

results.name: Salaries and Expenses, Small Business Administration
Disaster Loans Program Account, Small Business Administration
Business Assistance Trust Fund, Small Business Administration
Business Loan and Investment Fund, Liquidating Account, Small Business Administration
Business Loans Program Account, Small Business Administration
Disaster Loan Fund, Liquidating Account, Small Business Administration
Disaster Loans Program Account, Small Business Administration

quirks: Unknown bureau_slug values return HTTP 200 with zero totals/results rather than 404.
Range violations use 422 responses while type errors use 400, each with a single detail string.
404 and 500 errors return HTML instead of JSON.
agency_type accepts an empty string and still falls back to the default awarding behavior.
page_metadata.total represents the total record count, not the number of pages.
Requests for fiscal years <=2014 consistently triggered 500 server errors instead of validation feedback.

probes.notes: pass: default call returns FY 2026 data sorted by total_budgetary_resources desc with 10 results.

mismatches: Docs list sort members as name/id/total_obligations/total_budgetary_resources, but the API also accepts total_outlays (and reports it in errors).
Docs describe the FederalAccount object without total_outlays, yet every result includes total_outlays.
Doc example path uses bureau_of_the_census (underscores); production expects bureau-of-the-census and the documented path returns 404.
gaps: Minimum supported fiscal_year is unclear; requests through FY 2014 caused 500 errors rather than validation guidance.
No scenario produced a non-empty messages array, so its possible values remain unknown.
award vs funding agency_type differences were not observed; unclear when data diverges.
risks: Clients must handle HTML 404/500 responses despite expecting JSON.
Older fiscal years can trigger unexpected 500 errors, so integrations need retries or guards.
Typos in bureau_slug silently yield zeroed totals, which may mask mistakes.
The max fiscal_year constraint tracks the current year (422 when exceeded), so clients should derive year bounds dynamically.
